items.title: Cathie Wood, Tom Lee Align On These 10 Stock Picks: Some Might Surprise You
items.description: A new ETF from Tom Lee shares 10 stocks in common with Cathie Wood's Ark Funds. A look at the stocks both well-known financial figures like.

items.title: Caterpillar Inc. Maintains Dividend
items.description: The Board of Directors of Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) voted to maintain the quarterly dividend of one dollar and fifty-one cents ($1.51) per share of common stock payable Nov. 20 to shareholders of record at the close of business Oct. 20.
